heading: Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
label: 110108 Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)110108(a)36:2701(b)., , §§ 1(b), 15 (1st sentence), , 1361.Aug. 21, 1984Pub. L. 98–39198 Stat. 1358110108(b)36:2714 (1st sentence).In subsection (a), the words “retain and” and “organized and” are omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)110108(a)36:2701(b)., , §§ 1(b), 15 (1st sentence), , 1361.Aug. 21, 1984Pub. L. 98–39198 Stat. 1358110108(b)36:2714 (1st sentence).In subsection (a), the words “retain and” and “organized and” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Corporate Status
children.label: a .—Corporate Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as a corporation incorporated under the laws of New York.

children.heading: .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.label: b .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
